allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\(''@phosphor-icons/react''\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''Share''\) || k.includes\(''Arrow''\) || k.includes\(''Upload''\) || k.includes\(''Send''\)\).filter\(k => !k.includes\(''Icon''\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0, 40\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
